# SafePassBuilder — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

> Build your perfect password step by step — customise every detail with our interactive password builder.

## Tool
- [Password Builder & Generator](https://safepassbuilder.com/): Build your perfect password step by step — customise every detail with our interactive password builder.

## Blog
- [Blog](https://safepassbuilder.com/blog/): Guides and tips about password builder, custom password, interactive password generator.

## Key Facts
- Free to use, no sign-up required
- Client-side only — no data stored or transmitted
- Cryptographically secure (crypto.getRandomValues)

## Affiliate Disclosure
This site may contain affiliate links to password managers.
